allow: Bash(sed -i '' "s/import { Chart, LineController, LineElement, PointElement, LinearScale, CategoryScale, Tooltip, Legend } from ''chart.js''/import { Chart, LineController, LineElement, PointElement, LinearScale, CategoryScale, Tooltip, Legend, Filler } from ''chart.js''/" /Users/villevm/saliohjelma/src/components/ProgressScreen.jsx)
